name: Red Lobster Clam Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, blend clam juice, milk powder, and flour until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture into a saucepan and stir in chicken broth, stirring constantly on medium-high heat until thick and smooth.
3. Turn off the heat and stir in finely chopped celery, dry minced onion, mined clams, and parsley flakes.
4. Stir in peeled baked potatoes and keep on low heat for up to an hour, seasoning with salt and pepper.
5. This recipe freezes well.
